paths.description: Consumer discovers a running theorem-node's capabilities and API schema via the standard discovery route sequence.
paths.verification_method: live endpoint validation against theorem-node on port 3170

steps.description: Retrieve root discovery document with service identity and available routes.
Retrieve published capabilities with contract line and stability metadata.
Negotiate capability availability and confirm 0.6.x contract line stability rules.
Retrieve full OpenAPI schema for programmatic integration.

paths.description: Consumer discovers the authentication contract for protected routes.
paths.verification_method: live endpoint validation against theorem-node on port 3170

steps.description: Retrieve bearer auth contract with THEOREM_WITNESS_TOKEN environment variable requirement.
Confirm protected routes return 401 Unauthorized without bearer token.
Confirm protected routes return 403 Forbidden with invalid bearer token.

paths.description: Consumer discovers and validates the v0.6.0 release through the public release metadata chain.
paths.verification_method: file-level validation of release metadata chain in .pre-release-public

steps.description: Retrieve the release feed listing all published versions and their metadata paths.
steps.command: cat releases/feed.json | python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); assert 'v0.6.0' in str(d)"

steps.description: Retrieve the v0.6.0 release manifest with capabilities, artifacts, lifecycle, and upgrade contract.
steps.command: cat releases/v0.6.0/manifest.json | python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); assert d['version']=='v0.6.0'"

steps.description: Retrieve the v0.6.0 integrity metadata with SHA-256 hashes, SBOM references, and provenance.
steps.command: cat releases/v0.6.0/integrity.json | python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); assert 'binary_assets' in d"

steps.description: Retrieve trust root and verify signed metadata chain per metadata_authentication contract.

paths.description: Operator upgrades from 0.5.x to 0.6.0 via the two supported upgrade modes: FreeBSD upgrade-bundle and theorem-native ESP swap.
paths.verification_method: upgrade contract validation against manifest-input upgrade_contract section

steps.action: Verify upgrade-bundle artifact exists for 0.5.x to 0.6.0
steps.description: Confirm the upgrade-bundle artifact is declared in the manifest with mode in-place-boot-environment-upgrade.
steps.command: python3 -c "import json; m=json.load(open('.release/v0.6.0-manifest-input.json')); paths=m['upgrade_contract']['paths']; ub=[p for p in paths if p['mode']=='in-place-boot-environment-upgrade']; assert len(ub)==1"

steps.action: Verify state preservation across boot-environment switch
steps.description: Confirm upgrade preserves theorem/store, theorem/log, and /var/lib/theorem across boot-environment switch.
steps.command: python3 -c "import json; m=json.load(open('.release/v0.6.0-manifest-input.json')); p=[x for x in m['upgrade_contract']['paths'] if x['mode']=='in-place-boot-environment-upgrade'][0]; assert 'theorem/store' in p['state_strategy']"

steps.action: Verify rollback strategy via previous boot environment
steps.description: Confirm rollback activates previous boot environment via beadm/bectl and reboot.
steps.command: python3 -c "import json; m=json.load(open('.release/v0.6.0-manifest-input.json')); p=[x for x in m['upgrade_contract']['paths'] if x['mode']=='in-place-boot-environment-upgrade'][0]; assert 'beadm' in p['rollback_strategy'] or 'bectl' in p['rollback_strategy']"

steps.action: Verify UEFI ESP upgrade path exists for 0.5.x to 0.6.0
steps.description: Confirm the uefi-esp-upgrade path is declared in the manifest for theorem-native targets.
steps.command: python3 -c "import json; m=json.load(open('.release/v0.6.0-manifest-input.json')); paths=m['upgrade_contract']['paths']; esp=[p for p in paths if p['mode']=='uefi-esp-upgrade']; assert len(esp)==1"

steps.action: Verify ESP partition generation swap strategy
steps.description: Confirm ESP upgrade writes new ESP image and updates UEFI boot variables with rollback to previous ESP generation.
steps.command: python3 -c "import json; m=json.load(open('.release/v0.6.0-manifest-input.json')); p=[x for x in m['upgrade_contract']['paths'] if x['mode']=='uefi-esp-upgrade'][0]; assert 'ESP' in p['state_strategy']; assert 'previous ESP' in p['rollback_strategy']"

steps.action: Verify single pipeline governs both FreeBSD and theorem-native surfaces
steps.description: Confirm release.governed-publication capability covers both targets through one pipeline.
steps.command: python3 -c "import json; m=json.load(open('.release/v0.6.0-manifest-input.json')); c=[x for x in m['capabilities']['changed'] if x['id']=='release.governed-publication'][0]; assert 'single governed pipeline' in c['summary']"

steps.description: Confirm the upgrade contract declares the 0.6.x line with major version boundary and deprecation window policies.
